runs.summary: Deep review of PR #4371 — left 3 comments
runs.details: Scanned target-test-prep/ttp for open PRs. Found PR #4371 (bug/ttp-5997-chapter-titles-appear-truncated). Performed deep code review. Left 3 inline comments regarding CSS overflow handling and text truncation logic. Suggested using text-overflow: ellipsis with max-width constraint.

runs.summary: Reviewed PR #4353 — left 2 comments on deprecation handling
runs.details: Scanned target-test-prep/ttp for open PRs. Found PR #4353 (bug/ttp-5462-deprecated-errors-field). Reviewed Rails 7 migration for errors field syntax. Left 2 comments about backward compatibility with existing error message consumers.
